scope.summary: P6: the plan-to-Beads graph validator carried 38 error codes and had never been observed rejecting anything OR accepting anything; --selftest now proves it can fail, by feeding it a graph known to be malformed one rule at a time and requiring the matching code, plus a good graph that must be accepted.
out_of_scope: Only 10 of the 38 error codes are exercised; the remaining codes are still unobserved and the selftest does not claim otherwise.
No committed v2 manifest is introduced: the selftest builds its manifest on disk at run time, so this does not promote or validate any real plan graph.
The promotion path (apply_promotion) is not exercised; this covers validation only.

entry_points.name: scripts/plan_bead_graph_lint.py --selftest
entry_points.trace: Builds a minimal manifest on disk (real plan file, real per-repo JSONL trackers, matching source_document checksum), requires it to be ACCEPTED, then applies one targeted mutation per rule and requires the matching code: duplicate task slug -> E_TASK_SLUG; duplicate tracking label -> E_TASK_LABEL; dependency on an unknown task -> E_REFERENCE_UNKNOWN; unsupported schema -> E_SCHEMA; missing acceptance text -> E_TASK_ACCEPTANCE; release target disagreement -> E_SEMVER_ASSERTION; '.' in a label (Beads rejects it) -> E_TASK_LABEL. The accept case is the anti-vacuity guard in the other direction: a validator that rejected everything would fail it, so neither 'always true' nor 'always false' survives. MUTATION CONTROL at the validator itself, not just at the fixtures: making Findings.error a no-op -- precisely the unconditional-true lint this is meant to rule out -- produces 'duplicate task slug was NOT rejected with E_TASK_SLUG; got no findings' and exit 1. Clean run exits 0.

entry_points.name: CI lint job
entry_points.trace: The selftest is wired into the lint job, so the gate is checked on every push rather than trusted.

limitations: The selftest proves the validator discriminates on the 10 rules it mutates; a rule outside that set could still be unconditionally true and this would not catch it.

This is the same defect shape as the 17 zero-match cargo test gates fixed in 401090be: a gate only ever observed passing is indistinguishable from one that returns true unconditionally. The fix rules that out for the covered rules only.
follow_ups: Extend the mutation set toward the remaining 28 error codes as real manifests are promoted.
